description: Fix incorrect OpenCode config file path in the Quick Start docs. The docs say ~/.config/opencode/config.json but the correct filename is opencode.json (both for the global path ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json and the project-root path opencode.json).
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix OpenCode config path in Quick Start docs
userStories.description: As a new user following the Quick Start guide, I want the correct OpenCode config file path so that I can configure OpenCode to connect to my OpenTabs server.
acceptanceCriteria: The OpenCode row in the config file table in quick-start.mdx shows `~/.config/opencode/opencode.json` instead of `~/.config/opencode/config.json`
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/content/docs/quick-start.mdx, line 44. Change:
  | OpenCode | `~/.config/opencode/config.json` |
To:
  | OpenCode | `~/.config/opencode/opencode.json` |

This aligns with what the CLI code uses in platform/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts line 257 (the global path) and platform/cli/src/commands/start.ts line 178 (which shows 'opencode.json in project root'). The global path ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json is the better recommendation for the Quick Start since it works globally across all projects.
